rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VEOLSIE YOUNG HOPKINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrers And Demurrer To Probate Code 850 Petition; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: 1st Cause of Action for Rescission: Tentative ruling: sustain without leave to amend based on statute of limitations. 2nd Cause of Action for Recovery of Real Property and Quiet Title: Tentative ruling: sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to statute of limitations, standing, and failure to adequately identify property at issue or Wachovia's interest in it; overrule as to Probate Code section 850 ground. 3rd Cause of Action for Cancellation of Grant Deed and Promissory Note and Deed of Trust to Wachovia and Deed of Trust to Wells Fargo: Tentative ruling: sustain with 10 days leave to amend regarding each bank as to statute of limitations, standing and no adequate facts stated; overrule as to Probate Code section 850 ground. 5th Cause of Action for Elder Abuse: Tentative ruling: sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to statute of limitations and failure to state a cause of action; overrule as to Probate Code section 850 and standing grounds. 5th Cause of Action for Negligence (should be labeled 6th Cause of Action): Tentative ruling: sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to statute of limitations and no allegation that either bank owed a duty of care or violation of any such duty; overrule as to Probate Code section 850 and standing grounds.
